payload.text: Advanced t-0054 by removing additional stale machine-rollup projections. `pi-research` and `pi-initiatives` no longer repo-materialize `dashboard.json`; their stores now compute dashboard data on demand from canonical state instead of treating the dashboard file as part of repo materialization. Updated readmes and focused tests accordingly. Verification for this cleanup slice: npm test -- --run packages/pi-research/__tests__/store.test.ts packages/pi-research/__tests__/integration-smoke.test.ts packages/pi-initiatives/__tests__/store.test.ts packages/pi-initiatives/__tests__/dashboard.test.ts passed (4 files / 5 tests), and npm run typecheck passed.

Removed persisted dashboard artifact paths from worker and Ralph runtime surfaces, deleted unused dashboard path helpers from plans/docs/critique/initiatives/research, and kept dashboards computed on demand. Verified workers/Ralph/research/initiatives cleanup slice with 11 passing test files plus workspace typecheck.

Reworked PlanStore async path to materialize packet/plan outputs from canonical shared storage without writing state.json, replaced heavy linked-context reads with direct entity lookups for most linked records, removed state.json expectations from plan tests, and verified plan + dependent slices with passing targeted tests and typecheck.

Removed more persisted dashboard path scaffolding and advanced the plan async path off state.json writes. Also validated that docs/critique/ralph still need projection-to-canonical sync on async reads because fresh subprocess/update flows land durable file changes that must be ingested back into canonical storage. Verified plan tests (4 files / 8 tests), docs+critique+ralph tests (15 files / 48 tests), workers/Ralph/research/initiatives cleanup slices, and workspace typecheck.

payload.verificationNote: Verified the final storage cutover with full-workspace validation: `npm run test` passed with 69/69 test files and 185/185 tests, and `npm run typecheck` passed. Final critique `final-review-of-sqlite-storage-package-cutover` resolved with verdict `pass`. Accepted architectural carve-out: docs/critique/ralph retain projection-to-canonical ingestion for fresh-process workflows, documented in the finalized storage spec; dashboards are computed on demand and no longer persisted as `dashboard.json`.
